title: Senior Investment Banker at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Investment Banker in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
